rollback_steps: Prefer reverting the Phase 5 squash commit through the protected-main PR path so history remains auditable.
If production regresses, promote baseline deployment dpl_8YU8jx92bEXVh2VpfbCktmYsXGqP only after rechecking / and /create.

Restore frontend/package.json, frontend/package-lock.json, and the prior workflow from baseline main SHA 689f448fb4e7163981599fc4f69669ea9b345ebb only if the patched dependency graph causes a proven regression.
Do not remove the permanent audit gate without replacing it with an equivalent security check.
